## Context

Search read paths were hot but the caching approach was unmeasured.

## Decision

Prefer a read-through cache for the search index.

## Alternatives

- Write-through cache (rejected: extra write latency).

## Consequences

- Cache warmth must be monitored.

## Reconciliation

Relevance-gated but not proven in this diff; recorded as candidate, excluded from the index.
